title: Create Coasters
description: Adds utilities to Create Mod for making a theme park
body:
# Create: Coasters

An addon designed around building better **theme parks** with the Create Mod!

Originally made for the Europica Park project, check them out on their discord [here](https://discord.gg/8USpZZwrKY)! 

This mod is **highly unbalanced!** It is designed for creative mode builders! There are no crafting recipes for the blocks, however the custom schedule instructions could still be abused by players, even in survival mode!

Now, with that out of the way, what does it actually add?

# Features:

<details>
<summary>Boost block</summary>
  
Will set the speed of trains passing over to a % of their max speed that you specify on the block. Useful for a speed boost on drops, or slowing down near stations!

</details>

<details>
<summary>Speed limit block</summary>
  
Will set the **max** speed of trains passing over to the % you specify on the block. Good for speed controlled sections of track, like slowing near a busy junction!

</details>

<details>
<summary>Lock seat block</summary>

Will lock or unlock the seats of contraptions above it. When powered, it will lock the seats, when unpowered, it will unlock. It will (un)lock all seats, unless a specific seat color is placed ontop of it. Then it will only (un)lock that color. Useful for preventing players from jumping out the ride early!

</details>

<details>
<summary>Lock seat schedule</summary>

Functions similar to the lock seat block, however in schedule form. Will lock or unlock (you pick which) all seats on the train, or a specific colored seat block you can specify.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Toggle steam sounds schedule</summary>

A schedule instruction that allows you to set the steam noises of a train on or off. Useful if  you don't want that chuffing noise on a specific train ride!

</details>

<details>
<summary>Camera zoom on high speed trains</summary>

On faster trains, the camera will start to zoom out slightly. While subtle, this does go a long way in making fast trains _feel_ more fast! If you are prone to motion sickness, or find the affect too much, you can disable or turn it down in your client config.

</details>


# Planned features

This mod isn't yet finished. I still have plenty of ideas I would love to implement! You can find my progress, along with planned features, over on the [github project](https://github.com/users/blockninja124/projects/1)
